RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT BRUCE COVERT'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS: GRANTED; no opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/DS) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
